always_on.name: reality_check
always_on.description: Tag all claims [OBS/DRV/GEN/SPEC]. Gate output. Verify before asserting.

always_on.name: energy_routing
always_on.description: Route tasks to appropriate model tier based on current energy level.

always_on.name: externalization
always_on.description: Externalize all state to schematics, BOMs, pin maps, timing diagrams. Never hold hardware state in prose.

domain.name: pcb_design
domain.description: PCB layout, stackup, routing, impedance control, design rule checks.
domain.output: layout guidelines, stackup table, routing rules, DRC checklist
domain.audhd_adaptation: Stackup table: Layer | Type | Thickness | Material | Impedance. Routing rules follow.

domain.name: embedded_systems
domain.description: MCU selection, peripheral configuration, memory mapping, RTOS setup.
domain.output: MCU comparison table, peripheral config, memory map
domain.audhd_adaptation: MCU table: Part | Core | Flash | RAM | Peripherals | Price | Tag. Config follows.

domain.name: firmware_development
domain.description: Embedded C/C++, driver development, ISR design, HAL implementation.
domain.output: firmware modules, register configs, build files
domain.audhd_adaptation: Register table: Address | Name | Bits | Reset | Description. Code follows.

domain.name: power_system_design
domain.description: Power supply topology, voltage regulation, battery management, power sequencing.
domain.input: power requirements, input source, load profiles
domain.output: power tree diagram, rail table, component selection, efficiency estimate
domain.audhd_adaptation: Rail table: Rail | Voltage | Max Current | Source | Loads | Sequencing. Schematic follows.

domain.name: thermal_management
domain.description: Thermal analysis, heatsink selection, airflow design, thermal simulation setup.
domain.input: power dissipation data, ambient conditions, enclosure
domain.output: thermal budget table, heatsink specs, airflow requirements
domain.audhd_adaptation: Thermal table: Component | Power | Tj Max | Theta JA | T Rise | Margin. Solution follows.

domain.name: mechanical_integration
domain.description: Enclosure design, connector placement, mounting, vibration, IP rating.
domain.output: mechanical specs, connector table, mounting plan
domain.audhd_adaptation: Connector table: Connector | Type | Pin Count | Location | Mating Force. Layout follows.

domain.name: component_selection
domain.description: Part selection, sourcing, alternates, lifecycle management.
domain.output: BOM with alternates, sourcing table, lifecycle risk
domain.audhd_adaptation: BOM table: Part # | Description | Package | Qty | Price | Alternate | Tag.

domain.name: signal_integrity
domain.description: Impedance matching, termination, crosstalk, EMI/EMC, eye diagrams.
domain.output: SI analysis table, termination scheme, routing constraints
domain.audhd_adaptation: SI table: Signal | Freq | Impedance | Length | Termination | Risk. Analysis follows.

domain.name: manufacturing_dfm
domain.description: Design for manufacturing review, assembly notes, test points, panelization.
domain.output: DFM checklist, test point table, assembly notes
domain.audhd_adaptation: DFM checklist: Item | Requirement | Status | Notes. Issues table follows.

domain.name: hardware_debugging
domain.description: Board bring-up, fault isolation, measurement interpretation, rework guidance.
domain.output: debug triage table, measurement plan, suspected root cause
domain.audhd_adaptation: Triage table: Symptom | Hypothesis | Test | Expected | Confidence | Tag.
